name: Forest Green Sample
svg:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 450 450" width="450" height="450">
  <defs>
    
  </defs>
  <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#1a2f1a"/>
  
      <defs>
        <radialGradient id="forestGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#228b22" stop-opacity="0.3"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="transparent"/>
        </radialGradient>
        <linearGradient id="leafGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#90ee90"/>
          <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#006400"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      
      <!-- Forest background -->
      <rect width="450" height="450" fill="#1a2f1a"/>
      
      <!-- Dappled light effect -->
      <circle cx="98.0491927066061" cy="54.797190743513454" r="36.89879093257267" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="273.0352344989402" cy="82.55623994525543" r="48.810348548770804" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="254.420283134521" cy="305.12502676675217" r="49.37040139775063" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="351.9645143285793" cy="95.79883962156082" r="53.54523738369874" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="85.21107984100995" cy="61.515898891059884" r="33.07508175203746" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="214.30574615300512" cy="179.9049514653957" r="44.8174549045953" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="405.92031744220475" cy="162.90670435374687" r="49.788656629295794" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      <circle cx="57.08412871446447" cy="127.1534404350434" r="24.527226855369193" fill="#90ee90" opacity="0.05"/>
      
      <!-- Decorative leaves -->
      <g transform="translate(50, 50) rotate(-30)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="30" ry="15" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.6"/>
        <line x1="-25" y1="0" x2="25" y2="0" stroke="#006400" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(400, 80) rotate(45)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="25" ry="12" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="-20" y1="0" x2="20" y2="0" stroke="#006400" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(380, 380) rotate(15)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="35" ry="18" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.5"/>
        <line x1="-30" y1="0" x2="30" y2="0" stroke="#006400" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(70, 350) rotate(-45)">
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="28" ry="14" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.55"/>
        <line x1="-23" y1="0" x2="23" y2="0" stroke="#006400" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      
      <!-- Central glow -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="180" fill="url(#forestGlow)"/>
      
      <!-- Clock face -->
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="155" fill="rgba(26,47,26,0.8)" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="2"/>
      <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="145" fill="none" stroke="#228b22" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/>
      
      <!-- Vine-like markers -->
      <line x1="225" y1="85" x2="225" y2="100" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                  <circle cx="225" cy="85" r="4" fill="#ffd700" opacity="0.7"/>
      <line x1="295" y1="103.7564434701786" x2="287.5" y2="116.74682452694518" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="346.24355652982143" y1="155" x2="333.25317547305485" y2="162.5" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="365" y1="225" x2="350" y2="225" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                  <circle cx="365" cy="225" r="4" fill="#ffd700" opacity="0.7"/>
      <line x1="346.24355652982143" y1="295" x2="333.25317547305485" y2="287.5" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="295" y1="346.2435565298214" x2="287.5" y2="333.25317547305485" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="225" y1="365" x2="225" y2="350" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                  <circle cx="225" cy="365" r="4" fill="#ffd700" opacity="0.7"/>
      <line x1="155.00000000000003" y1="346.24355652982143" x2="162.50000000000003" y2="333.25317547305485" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="103.75644347017858" y1="295" x2="116.74682452694516" y2="287.5" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="85" y1="225.00000000000003" x2="100" y2="225.00000000000003" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                  <circle cx="85" cy="225.00000000000003" r="4" fill="#ffd700" opacity="0.7"/>
      <line x1="103.7564434701786" y1="155" x2="116.74682452694518" y2="162.5" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      <line x1="154.99999999999994" y1="103.75644347017861" x2="162.49999999999994" y2="116.74682452694519" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
      
      <!-- Hour numbers (nature font style) -->
      <text x="225" y="120" fill="#90ee90" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">12</text>
      <text x="330" y="225" fill="#90ee90" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">3</text>
      <text x="225" y="330" fill="#90ee90" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">6</text>
      <text x="120" y="225" fill="#90ee90" font-size="18" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">9</text>
      
      <!-- Clock hands -->
      
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="287.6086525481931" y2="175.19882906899045" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="116.26567245104482" y2="241.63869022719422" stroke="#90ee90" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="225" y1="225" x2="184.82779073125684" y2="348.63734711837" stroke="#ffd700" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="225" cy="225" r="10" fill="#ffd700" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" opacity="1"/>
  
      
      <!-- Small decorative elements -->
      <circle cx="165" cy="305" r="8" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.4"/>
      <circle cx="295" cy="155" r="6" fill="#228b22" opacity="0.3"/>
    
</svg>
